text:
Agree with the principle.

As a consequence of the principle, betting after the resolution time should not be allowed. (As the market is officially closed)

That would have prevented the whole @willo2_Poly situation all together.

If you bet on an athlete to win, and he wins, but then after the resolution time he gets disqualified because of cheating (remember all the 100m sprint doping scandals). You would still have won the bet.

It shouldn't matter if the new information came out 1 second or 1 year after the resolution time. 

Violating this principle would create a very slippery slope.

Now, I do agree the wording was EXTREMELY unclear, but the decision is still NO.

I wonder if a single employee uses the @Wise app. The UX is absolutely retarded. 

1/ You can't go to a transaction, and send a new payment to the counterparty from that view. 
2/ When making a new payment, you can't edit the reference, because it's hidden behind the iOS keyboard.

🤦🏻
This is good 😆

Introducing Thesis Builder

Use a chat interface to build your vision of the future.
Get suggestions of companies and timeframes to play the thesis.

If you want access you will have to let me know (not publically available for now) https://t.co/tUBWL8Q86E
Today is full focus on portfolio clean-up. I sold positions in $NVDA $MSFT $NOW and $META. There were just too many conflicting theses.
https://t.co/1gJc7kEIhA

It's a bit of a frustrating day here. 

I'm migrating away from @Lovable because it's just too expensive. I have a Claude Max subscription which I can't use. 

However, credit where credit is due. It was so much easier to vibe code on @Lovable than just with @claudeai. But yeah, I can't spend EUR 800/month, when I can take a Claude subscription at EUR 80/month.

We added the first version of Asset Research.

This way you can research your preferred assets.
See how many people are LONG or SHORT.

I'm thinking of creating a global filter, so all your decisions can be made based on influencers that you actually trust.

Because what is the value of knowing an average caller is holding your preferred asset.

We updated our onboarding flow.

We saw from the data that many people entering our website didn't know what action to take next, so we streamlined the experience slightly.

Let us know what you think. 

(Us is me and my army of AI agents 😆) https://t.co/N5XSab96wi
We are at 100 tracked influencers now 😍 https://t.co/4DpK74IcX6

We have a new leader @sambtrades  on the Global Leaderboard. 

When opening his trades, eye watering, not sure if I would have the guts to follow.

Risk Management is advised!

Features on our roadmap to deal with this:
- Input your preferred Entry and Exit Strategies, and see which influencers' calls fit your investment or trading style
- Post Deletion detection. We detect if an influencer is removing bad calls from their history.

We have Asset pages now, which are revealing a whole set of interesting insights 😍

How many calls we have on the platform.
Who the influencer is with the most calls.
A timeline of the latest calls.

If you have thoughts or feedback, let me know!

The vision here is: Pure Signal Notifications! 🤩
I added some non-intrusive ads, of products I use myself, that I think would be valuable to the user of the app. https://t.co/aH3oCFv3Ke

Big improvements have been made to the website today!

Thank you again @WarrenEnMkts for questioning the WinRate ranking for the Global Leaderboard.

I made a video about my final decision, and the new metric that drives the Global Leaderboard.

I think influencers such as @patientinvestor, @LazaroInvestor, @EquityClock can be happy they ended up on the top of the new Global Leaderboard. (Thank you @LazaroInvestor for still liking my tweets after my last algorithm pushed you in the gutter for a full day).

And we are welcoming more strongly at the top @CarilonCapital and @TheGladiatorHC 

I'm excited to hear all of your feedback! Looking to create a Trading / Investment Platform that adds trust and ultimately more money in your pockets.

After some great feedback from @WarrenEnMkts I updated the following (for now). Feedback on the feedback is welcome.

"PnL/day" is becoming the main metric for the Global Leaderboard. Let's try it out! 

Honestly it feels weird to have a top leaderboard with lower AVG PNL's, and negative Win Rates. I need to digest this, and understand if this metric actually makes sense. 

What do you think?

My next job is to go deep into the data of this top 5!

I also update the PnL/day from Linear Growth to Compounded Growth.

Famous short seller @RealJimChanos to become the top of the leaderboard, talk about unexpected.

Just closed my first trade using my new app :) $MSFT

Profitably ;)

The big update (now using 1min candles for the calls) is through!  

Together with the markets' opening movements we have some movement at the top of the leaderboard.  

#1 @LazaroInvestor
#2 @cantonmeow 
#3 @EquityClock

No pressure! ;) https://t.co/qlZiUmYo3l
Working hard on improving live and historical data to include extended trading hours. 😍
